title: Favorita Store Sales Forecasting
methodology: Multivariate time-series forecasting (retail demand): per-series Prophet baseline with holiday + oil regressors; panel LightGBM advanced model with lag features and quantile-regression heads
needs_main_session_execution: data: kaggle competitions download -c store-sales-time-series-forecasting (kaggle CLI not validated in scaffold session; documented in data/README.md)
blockers: Dataset not pre-downloaded: requires Kaggle competition rules acceptance under the user's Kaggle account; download command and manual fallback documented in data/README.md
